name: skosmos-mcp
description: MCP server wrapping the Skosmos REST API for SKOS vocabulary navigation and management
long_description: A production-quality Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that wraps the Skosmos REST API, enabling AI assistants to navigate and query SKOS vocabularies. Includes 13 MCP tools for vocabulary browsing, concept lookup, full-text search, label resolution, and BFS traversal, plus 4 SPARQL tools for direct RDF data access. Features TTL-based in-memory cache, retry logic with exponential backoff, strict TypeScript validation, and Zod-validated inputs.

tools.name: list_vocabularies
tools.description: List all available vocabularies in the Skosmos instance

tools.name: get_vocabulary
tools.description: Get details of a specific vocabulary including top concepts

tools.name: get_concept
tools.description: Get full concept details including broader, narrower, and related concepts

tools.name: get_concept_label
tools.description: Get all labels (prefLabel, altLabel, hiddenLabel) for a concept URI

tools.name: concept_path
tools.description: Get the hierarchy path from a concept to its root via broader transitive relations

tools.name: search_concepts
tools.description: Full-text search for concepts across one or all vocabularies

tools.name: resolve_label
tools.description: Resolve a label text to concepts in a vocabulary

tools.name: labels
tools.description: Get all labels for a concept URI in a vocabulary

tools.name: broader_concepts
tools.description: BFS traversal of broader (parent) concepts up to a specified depth

tools.name: narrower_concepts
tools.description: BFS traversal of narrower (child) concepts down to a specified depth

tools.name: related_concepts
tools.description: BFS traversal of related concepts up to a specified depth

tools.name: traverse_concepts
tools.description: BFS traversal using a mix of broader, narrower, and/or related relationships

tools.name: execute_sparql_query
tools.description: Execute a SPARQL query against a SPARQL endpoint (SELECT, CONSTRUCT, ASK, or DESCRIBE)

tools.name: execute_sparql_update
tools.description: Execute a SPARQL update query against a SPARQL endpoint

tools.name: list_sparql_graphs
tools.description: List all available named graphs in a SPARQL endpoint

tools.name: sparql_query_templates
tools.description: Get SPARQL query templates for common knowledge graph exploration patterns

skosmos_base_url.title: Skosmos Base URL
skosmos_base_url.description: Base URL of the Skosmos instance (e.g., https://api.finto.fi)

skosmos_default_vocabulary.title: Default Vocabulary
skosmos_default_vocabulary.description: Default vocabulary ID to use when not specified in a tool call (optional)

skosmos_default_language.title: Default Language
skosmos_default_language.description: Default language code for labels (e.g., en, fi)

skosmos_max_traversal_depth.title: Max Traversal Depth
skosmos_max_traversal_depth.description: Hard cap on BFS traversal depth

skosmos_tool_server_url_allowed.title: Allow Custom Skosmos URLs
skosmos_tool_server_url_allowed.description: When true, allows tools to accept optional server_url parameter to call a different Skosmos instance

sparql_endpoint_url.title: SPARQL Endpoint URL
sparql_endpoint_url.description: SPARQL endpoint URL (optional; enables SPARQL tools)

sparql_allow_other_endpoints.title: Allow Other SPARQL Endpoints
sparql_allow_other_endpoints.description: When true, allows SPARQL tools to accept optional endpoint parameter to query a different SPARQL endpoint

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Log level: debug, info, warn, error
